inputs.prompt: Newsletter: The Craft. Voice: Direct, practical. Free tier: Weekly edition on the business of writing. Paid tier ($8/month or $80/year): Every Friday, 'The Rate Sheet' — a curated list of 10-15 publications currently commissioning freelancers, with actual fee ranges sourced from working writers. Plus monthly Q&A with an editor from a major publication. Free subscribers: 4,200.
Newsletter: Daily Science Brief. Voice: Enthusiastic, clear. Free tier: Daily science story. Paid tier ($5/month): Weekend deep-dive essay and access to the source library. Free subscribers: 12,000.

Newsletter: European Housing Watch. Voice: Analytical, evidence-based. Free tier: Fortnightly policy analysis. Paid tier (€10/month or €96/year): The quarterly Housing Affordability Index — original data analysis covering 30 European cities with methodology notes. Plus access to a member-only database of European housing policy documents and translations. Free subscribers: 7,800.
